conservative.name: Leap From Stillness
conservative.requirements: At least 2 units deep in Conservative stance, melee weapon equipped, target within close range

success.description: You manoeuvre to engaged with the target, ignoring any obstacles in your way, and hit for normal damage

boon.description: Recharge 1 of your Active Defences the has its Reckless face up

sigmarsComet.description: You may adjust your stance to 1 space deep in Reckless

reckless.name: Stooping Hawk Leap
reckless.requirements: At least 2 units deep in Reckless stance, melee weapon equipped, target within close range

success.description: You manoeuvre to engaged with the target, ignoring any obstacles in your way, and hit for normal damage

boon.description: Draw a number of critical wounds equal to the number of Ritual Dances you have recharging with their Conservative face up. Choose 1 to apply and discard the rest

sigmarsComet.description: You may adjust your stance to 1 space deep in Conservative
